name: Apprentice Learning Module
description: Shadow mode implementation for the Apprentice learning system. Accepts AI review output and human review decisions (as JSON input), compares them, records acceptance/dismissal rates per reviewer and per finding type. Stores learning state in JSON files (.exemplar/learner/). Feeds acceptance patterns back as trust score adjustments using weight = base_weight * (accepted/total) clamped [0.1, 1.0]. Phase progression tracking (shadow → canary → primary) based on configurable accuracy thresholds with no regression. Stigmergy integration reports recurring patterns (e.g., 'SecurityReviewer false-positive rate on test files is 40%') to pattern store. All I/O is async. Fire-and-forget for optional integrations (chronicler, stigmergy). PACT keys on all public methods.

types.name: LearnerPhase
types.description: Apprentice learning phase progression stage.

types.name: HumanDecision
types.description: The human reviewer's disposition on an AI-generated finding.

types.name: PatternKind
types.description: Classification of a detected recurring pattern for stigmergy reporting.

types.name: ReviewerId

fields.name: value
fields.description: The reviewer identifier string.

validators.error_message: ReviewerId must be between 1 and 128 characters.
ReviewerId must start with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, dots, or hyphens.

types.description: Canonical reviewer identifier string. Must be non-empty and match the pattern used in schemas.ReviewerId.

types.name: RuleId

fields.name: value
fields.description: The rule identifier string.

validators.error_message: RuleId must be between 1 and 256 characters.
RuleId must start with a letter and contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, dots, slashes, or hyphens.

types.description: Canonical rule identifier string. Non-empty, dot-separated namespace.

types.name: TrustWeight

fields.name: value
fields.description: The clamped, rounded trust weight.

validators.error_message: TrustWeight must be between 0.1 and 1.0 inclusive.

types.description: A trust weight value clamped to [0.1, 1.0] and rounded to 4 decimal places.

types.name: AcceptanceRate

fields.name: value
fields.description: The acceptance rate.

validators.error_message: AcceptanceRate must be between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.

types.description: A rate value in [0.0, 1.0] representing the fraction of accepted findings.

types.name: MinObservations

fields.name: value
fields.description: The minimum observation count.

types.description: Minimum number of observations before trust adjustments are applied. Default 10.

types.name: FilePath

fields.name: value
fields.description: The file path.

validators.error_message: FilePath must be between 1 and 4096 characters.

types.description: A validated file path string.

types.name: PactKey

fields.name: value
fields.description: The PACT key.

validators.error_message: PactKey must follow the format pact:<component>:<method>.

types.description: A PACT attribution key string embedded in public method metadata.

types.name: HumanDecisionInput

fields.name: finding_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the AI-generated finding being adjudicated.

validators.error_message: finding_id must be non-empty and at most 256 characters.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Identifier of the AI reviewer that produced the finding.

fields.name: rule_id
fields.description: The rule that triggered the finding.

fields.name: decision
fields.description: The human's disposition on this finding.

fields.name: file_path
fields.description: Path of the file the finding pertains to.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity of the original finding (maps to schemas.Severity).

validators.error_message: severity must be one of: critical, high, medium, low, info.

fields.name: review_stage
fields.description: The review stage in which the finding was produced (maps to schemas.ReviewStage).

fields.name: comment
fields.description: Optional human-provided rationale for the decision.

fields.name: timestamp_iso
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the decision. If omitted, current UTC time is used.

validators.error_message: timestamp_iso must be empty or a valid ISO 8601 datetime string.

types.description: Validated input schema for a single human feedback decision on an AI-generated finding. Frozen Pydantic model.

types.name: LearningRecord

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Unique record identifier.

fields.name: finding_id
fields.description: ID of the Finding this record is about.

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: Reviewer that produced the finding.

fields.name: stage
fields.description: Stage the finding belongs to.

fields.name: rule_id
fields.description: Rule ID of the finding.

fields.name: severity
fields.description: Severity of the original finding.

fields.name: accepted
fields.description: True if the human accepted/agreed with the finding, false if dismissed.

fields.name: human_comment
fields.description: Optional comment from the human reviewer.

fields.name: recorded_at
fields.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when this learning was recorded.

types.description: A single learning observation: an AI finding paired with human decision (accepted or dismissed).

types.name: ReviewerRuleStats

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: The AI reviewer identifier.

fields.name: rule_id
fields.description: The rule identifier.

fields.name: review_stage
fields.description: The review stage.

fields.name: accepted_count
fields.description: Number of times findings for this reviewer+rule+stage were accepted.

fields.name: dismissed_count
fields.description: Number of times findings were dismissed.

fields.name: modified_count
fields.description: Number of times findings were modified (accepted with changes).

fields.name: total_count
fields.description: Total observations (accepted + dismissed + modified).

fields.name: acceptance_rate
fields.description: Fraction of findings accepted (including modified). Computed as (accepted + modified) / total.

types.description: Aggregated acceptance/dismissal statistics for a specific reviewer + rule_id + review_stage combination. Frozen Pydantic model.

types.name: ReviewerStats

fields.name: reviewer_id
fields.description: The AI reviewer identifier.

fields.name: review_stage
fields.description: The review stage.

fields.name: accepted_count
fields.description: Total accepted findings.

fields.name: dismissed_count
fields.description: Total dismissed findings.

fields.name: modified_count
fields.description: Total modified findings.

fields.name: total_count
fields.description: Total observations.

fields.name: acceptance_rate
fields.description: Overall acceptance rate for this reviewer+stage.

fields.name: rule_stats
fields.description: Per-rule breakdown.

types.description: Coarse aggregated statistics for a reviewer across all rules within a review stage. Frozen Pydantic model.

types.name: PhaseTransition

fields.name: from_phase

fields.name: to_phase

fields.name: timestamp_iso

fields.name: acceptance_rate_at_transition

fields.name: total_observations

fields.name: current_phase

fields.name: transition_history

types.description: Tracks the current phase and full transition history. Frozen Pydantic model.

types.name: LearnerState

fields.name: schema_version

fields.name: phase_state

fields.name: reviewer_stats

fields.name: reviewer_rule_stats
fields.description: List of ReviewerRuleStats, one per reviewer+rule+stage combination.

fields.name: total_records
fields.description: Total number of LearningRecords persisted.

fields.name: last_updated_iso
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state update.

types.description: Top-level persisted state container for the learner. Written atomically to .exemplar/learner/state.json. Frozen Pydantic model.

fields.name: stage

fields.name: weight

validators.error_message: Trust weight must be between 0.0 and 1.0

fields.name: accepted_count

fields.name: dismissed_count

fields.name: updated_at

types.description: Arbiter trust weight for a reviewer agent, used in weighted assessment merging.

types.name: RecordDecisionResult

fields.name: new_phase

types.description: Result returned from record_decision indicating what happened.

types.name: Severity
types.description: Severity level of a review finding, ordered from most to least critical.

types.name: ReviewStage
types.description: Named stage in the review circuit pipeline.

functions.name: record_decision
functions.description: Accepts one or more LearningRecords, persists them to .exemplar/learner/records.json (append-only), updates aggregated ReviewerRuleStats and ReviewerStats in state.json, evaluates phase progression, and emits a learning.recorded ChroniclerEvent. Atomic file writes. PACT key: pact:learner:record_decision.

inputs.name: records
inputs.description: One or more LearningRecord objects to persist. List of LearningRecord.

validators.error_message: Must provide between 1 and 1000 records per call.

error_cases.name: duplicate_record_id
error_cases.condition: One or more record_id values already exist in records.json.

error_data.duplicate_ids: Comma-separated list of duplicate record_id values.

error_cases.name: storage_write_failure
error_cases.condition: Atomic write to records.json or state.json fails (disk full, permissions).

error_cases.name: invalid_record
error_cases.condition: One or more records fail Pydantic validation.

error_cases.name: concurrent_write_detected
error_cases.condition: Another writer is detected (lock file present or state.json modified since last read).

preconditions: All records in the list must have unique record_id values.
All records must have valid reviewer_id, rule_id, and decision fields.
postconditions: All provided records are appended to records.json atomically.
Aggregated stats in state.json reflect the new records.
A learning.recorded ChroniclerEvent has been emitted (fire-and-forget).
If the new overall acceptance rate crosses a phase threshold, phase_changed is True and a phase.transition ChroniclerEvent is emitted.
side_effects: May emit phase.transition ChroniclerEvent if phase advances (fire-and-forget)

structured_side_effects.description: Atomically appends new LearningRecord entries to the append-only records file.
Atomically rewrites aggregated LearnerState with updated stats and possibly new phase.
Emits learning.recorded ChroniclerEvent. Fire-and-forget; failure does not propagate.
Logs record count, phase status, and any errors at DEBUG/WARNING level.

performance_budget.complexity: O(n + m) where n = new records, m = existing stats entries

functions.name: record_human_decisions
functions.description: Convenience method that maps a list of HumanDecisionInput objects into LearningRecords (generating record_id and timestamp) and delegates to record_decision. PACT key: pact:learner:record_human_decisions.

inputs.name: decisions
inputs.description: One or more HumanDecisionInput objects. List of HumanDecisionInput.

validators.error_message: Must provide between 1 and 1000 decisions per call.

inputs.name: base_weight
inputs.description: The base weight to use for trust calculations (typically 1.0).

error_cases.name: invalid_decision_input
error_cases.condition: One or more HumanDecisionInput objects fail Pydantic validation.

preconditions: All decisions must pass HumanDecisionInput validation.
postconditions: Each HumanDecisionInput is converted to a LearningRecord with a new UUID4 record_id.
record_decision is called with the converted records.
All postconditions of record_decision apply.

structured_side_effects.description: Delegates to record_decision which appends records.
Delegates to record_decision which updates state.
Delegates to record_decision which emits events.

functions.name: get_trust_adjustments
functions.description: Computes and returns trust score adjustments for all reviewer+rule+stage combinations that meet the minimum observation threshold. Weight formula: base_weight * (accepted_count / total_count) clamped to [0.1, 1.0], rounded to 4 decimal places. Cold-start protection: combinations with total_count < min_observations are excluded. PACT key: pact:learner:get_trust_adjustments.

inputs.name: min_observations
inputs.description: Minimum observations required before producing a trust adjustment. Default 10.

error_cases.name: state_not_found
error_cases.condition: state.json does not exist (no decisions have been recorded yet).

error_cases.name: state_corruption
error_cases.condition: state.json exists but fails Pydantic validation.

postconditions: Returned list contains only TrustScore entries where observation_count >= min_observations.
Every weight in the returned TrustScore entries is in [0.1, 1.0] and rounded to 4 decimal places.
The list is deterministically ordered by (reviewer_id, rule_id, review_stage).

structured_side_effects.description: Reads the current LearnerState to compute trust adjustments.
Logs the number of adjustments produced and any cold-start exclusions at DEBUG level.

performance_budget.complexity: O(s) where s = number of ReviewerRuleStats entries

functions.name: check_phase_progression
functions.description: Evaluates whether the current learner phase should advance based on ApprenticeConfig thresholds and overall acceptance rate. Phase transitions are monotonic (shadow→canary→primary, no regression). Emits a phase.transition ChroniclerEvent on transition. Returns the (possibly new) LearnerPhase. PACT key: pact:learner:check_phase_progression.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: ApprenticeConfig dictionary with keys: shadow_to_canary_threshold (float), canary_to_primary_threshold (float), min_observations_for_phase (int). Sourced from config component.

error_cases.name: invalid_config
error_cases.condition: Required threshold keys are missing or out of range in the config dict.

error_data.details: Description of what is missing or invalid.

error_cases.name: storage_write_failure
error_cases.condition: Atomic write to state.json fails during phase transition.

preconditions: config must contain shadow_to_canary_threshold and canary_to_primary_threshold as floats in [0.0, 1.0].
config must contain min_observations_for_phase as int >= 1.
postconditions: If phase changes, state.json is updated atomically with the new phase and a PhaseTransition entry.
If phase changes, a phase.transition ChroniclerEvent is emitted (fire-and-forget).
Returned LearnerPhase is >= the phase before the call (monotonic).

structured_side_effects.description: Reads current LearnerState to evaluate phase progression.
Writes updated LearnerState if phase transitions (conditional).
Emits phase.transition ChroniclerEvent on phase change. Fire-and-forget.
Logs current phase, acceptance rate, and whether transition occurred.

functions.name: detect_patterns
functions.description: Scans aggregated ReviewerRuleStats for recurring anomalies (high false-positive rates, category biases, file pattern biases) and returns a list of StigmergySignal objects. Emits pattern.detected ChroniclerEvent for each signal. PACT key: pact:learner:detect_patterns.

inputs.name: min_observations
inputs.description: Minimum observations for a stat entry to be considered for pattern detection. Default 10.

inputs.name: anomaly_threshold
inputs.description: The acceptance rate threshold below which a reviewer+rule is flagged as high_false_positive_rate. Default 0.5.

postconditions: Returned signals only reference reviewer+rule combinations with total_count >= min_observations.
Each signal has a unique signal_id (UUID4).
pattern.detected ChroniclerEvent emitted for each signal (fire-and-forget).

structured_side_effects.description: Reads LearnerState to scan for anomalous patterns.
Emits pattern.detected ChroniclerEvent per signal. Fire-and-forget.
Logs number of patterns detected and their kinds.

performance_budget.complexity: O(s) where s = number of ReviewerRuleStats entries

functions.name: get_current_phase
functions.description: Returns the current LearnerPhase from persisted state. Read-only, no side effects beyond file read. PACT key: pact:learner:get_current_phase.
preconditions: LearnerState must be loadable from .exemplar/learner/state.json, OR if state.json does not exist, returns LearnerPhase.shadow as the default.
postconditions: Returns a valid LearnerPhase value.

structured_side_effects.description: Reads current LearnerState to extract phase.

functions.name: should_apply_adjustments
functions.description: Returns True if the current phase is canary or primary (i.e., trust adjustments should be applied to reviewer weights). Returns False in shadow phase. PACT key: pact:learner:should_apply_adjustments.
postconditions: Returns True if and only if get_current_phase() returns canary or primary.
Returns False if state.json does not exist (defaults to shadow).

structured_side_effects.description: Reads current LearnerState to check phase.

functions.name: get_stats
functions.description: Returns a LearnerStatsReport summarizing current state for CLI display and debugging. Includes phase, total records, overall acceptance rate, per-reviewer stats, and number of active trust adjustments. PACT key: pact:learner:get_stats.

inputs.name: min_observations
inputs.description: Minimum observations for counting active trust adjustments. Default 10.

postconditions: Returned report reflects the current persisted state.
active_trust_adjustments counts only entries with total_count >= min_observations.

structured_side_effects.description: Reads LearnerState to build the stats report.
Logs stats retrieval at DEBUG level.

performance_budget.complexity: O(s) where s = total stats entries

functions.name: initialize_state
functions.description: Creates the .exemplar/learner/ directory and initializes empty state.json and records.json if they do not already exist. Safe to call multiple times (idempotent). PACT key: pact:learner:initialize_state.

inputs.name: storage_dir
inputs.description: Path to the .exemplar/learner/ directory. Defaults to '.exemplar/learner'.

validators.error_message: storage_dir must be between 1 and 4096 characters.

error_cases.name: permission_denied
error_cases.condition: Cannot create directory or files due to OS permissions.

error_data.path: The path that could not be created.

error_cases.name: existing_state_corruption
error_cases.condition: Files exist but are not valid JSON. Does NOT overwrite — returns error.

preconditions: Parent directory of storage_dir must exist or be creatable.
postconditions: storage_dir exists as a directory.
state.json exists with a valid empty LearnerState (phase=shadow, no stats, schema_version=1).
records.json exists with an empty JSON array.
Returns True if files were created, False if they already existed.

structured_side_effects.description: Creates initial empty LearnerState file if not present.
Creates initial empty records file if not present.
Logs initialization status.

invariants: LearnerPhase transitions are monotonic: shadow → canary → primary. No regression to a prior phase is permitted.
Trust adjustments are only produced when total_count >= MIN_OBSERVATIONS (default 10) for the given reviewer+rule combination (cold-start protection).
Trust weight is always clamped to [0.1, 1.0] and rounded to 4 decimal places for deterministic output.
All file writes use atomic write semantics: write to a temporary file then os.replace to the target path. No partial writes are observable.
Single-writer concurrency model: only one learner instance writes to .exemplar/learner/ at a time.
LearnerState.records list in records.json is append-only; existing records are never modified or deleted.
Phase transition thresholds are read from ApprenticeConfig and never hard-coded.
All public methods carry PACT keys for Sentinel attribution.
Chronicler and stigmergy integrations are fire-and-forget: unreachable services never block or raise to callers.

data_access.rationale: Reads AI-generated Finding objects (INTERNAL classification — contains file paths, code snippets, rule identifiers) and human decision inputs which may reference code authored by identifiable contributors (PII — author names or reviewer identities in HumanDecisionInput). Writes aggregated learning state and per-reviewer acceptance statistics to .exemplar/learner/state.json and .exemplar/learner/records.json (INTERNAL — no raw PII is persisted, only reviewer_id keys and numeric counters).

side_effects.rationale: Persists aggregated acceptance/dismissal stats and individual learning records to .exemplar/learner/state.json and .exemplar/learner/records.json via atomic write (temp file + os.replace).
Emits learning.recorded, phase.transition, and pattern.detected ChroniclerEvents at stage boundaries for governance traceability. Fire-and-forget — failures do not block.
Reports recurring reviewer accuracy patterns to the stigmergy pattern store for cross-component consumption. Fire-and-forget.

authority.rationale: The learner module is the sole authoritative owner of learning state (acceptance/dismissal records, aggregated reviewer stats, phase progression history) and the sole producer of trust score adjustments derived from that state. No other component may write to .exemplar/learner/ or independently compute trust adjustments.
